intent_head: Looking at my bills. Wow,  3 of PLA spool mixed colors at price of 24 is crazy. How much did pay this company in total? Number only

function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system per root AGENTS, and read nested AGENTS in finance folders before lookup.
function.outcome_justification: The referenced line item (PLA spool mixed colors qty 3 unit 24) is in the 2025-12-11 bill with counterparty Filamenthütte Wien. All records with that same counterparty have totals 72, 80, and 89 EUR; summed total paid is 241 EUR.
